narrative:
47 Ohio House district has 69,784 registered voters, with 60.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -1.8% D−R vs -19.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
